contract.name: voiStarcraft2 MicroMachine production map pool
notes: Production support is the explicit required pool, not every custom SC2 map.
Diagnostic maps collect blocker evidence and never count as production signoff.

maps.reason: Base97364 direct launch with VOI_SC2_CREATEGAME_MAP_DATA=1 now produces own start units, real MicroMachine macro evidence, gas income, manager intervention, and a 12000-frame Acropolis soak pass.
maps.promotion_rule: Keep qualified_baseline only while probe/smoke/production matrix evidence remains failed=0 with no bootstrap_no_start_units, no production deadlock, and no income stall.

preflight.notes: Qualified on 2026-06-25 after bootstrap probe, realtime smoke, and 12000-frame Acropolis soak passed on Base97364 with real MicroMachine runtime evidence.

maps.reason: Known MicroMachine map-support blocker: ramp/wall-off/placement path produced no_production_deadlock.
maps.promotion_rule: Promote only after Issue 48.3 proves 12k-frame macro soak with failed=0 and no allow-failures.

preflight.notes: Known ramp/wall-off/build-placement blocker from Thunderbird no-production deadlock evidence.

evidence_signatures: Unusual ramp detected, tiles to block = 0
promotion_criteria: Remove geometry_risk and placement_risk only after a patched MicroMachine build passes Thunderbird at 12000 frames.
Required evidence: macro_evidence_ok=true, manager_intervention_ok=true, fresh modulation consumption, failed=0, and SOAK_MATRIX_ALLOW_FAILURES=0.
Promotion must move Thunderbird from diagnostic to required in MICROMACHINE_MAP_POOL.json and keep production tier failed=0.

maps.reason: Placeholder class for maps outside the declared production and diagnostic pools.
maps.promotion_rule: Move to diagnostic first, collect preflight/soak evidence, then promote to required only after failed=0 production evidence.

preflight.notes: Explicitly excluded from MicroMachine production support.

smoke.description: Fast required-pool verification for local smoke iteration.

production.description: Current production qualification tier before expanded map hardening.

extended.description: Expanded required-pool qualification across baseline ladder races and low-to-medium built-in AI difficulty tiers.

diagnostic.description: Known blockers and unqualified maps; never production signoff.
